zh.lifeSummary: 當David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire於大約1515年出生在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾時，他的父親Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland25歲，母親Helen Wardlaw20歲。他於1557年5月11日與Elizabeth Forrester在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1582年在蘇格蘭被列為judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland 。他去世於大約1595年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire于大约1515年出生在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾时，他的父亲Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland25岁，母亲Helen Wardlaw20岁。他于1557年5月11日与Elizabeth Forrester在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1582年在苏格兰被列为judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland 。他去世于大约1595年在苏格兰米德洛迪安享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacGill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McGill
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Ghoill ‘son of the stranger (or lowlander)’ (see Gall 1).

Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) G(h)iolla (Irish) or Mac (an) G(h)ille (Scottish) ‘son of the lad’ (i.e. ‘servant’), or a short form of a personal name formed by attaching this element to the name of a saint, in the sense ‘devotee’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire was born about 1515, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, his father, Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland, was 25 and his mother, Helen Wardlaw, was 20. He married Elizabeth Forrester on 11 May 1557, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. In 1582, his occupation is listed as judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  in Scotland. He died about 1595, in Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire est né environ 1515, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, son père, Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Helen Wardlaw, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Forrester le 11 mai 1557, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. En 1582, sa profession de son indiquée est judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  à Écosse. Il est décédé environ 1595, à Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire um 1515 in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland 25 und seine Mutter Helen Wardlaw 20. Er hat am 11. Mai 1557 in Scotland Elizabeth Forrester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1582 ist sein Beruf als judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb um 1595 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire è nato il circa 1515 nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Helen Wardlaw, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Forrester il 11 maggio 1557, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1582, la sua occupazione è indicata come judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  nel Scotland. Morì circa 1595, nel Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshireが約1515年にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Couslandは25歳，母Helen Wardlawは20歳であった。1557年5月11日にスコットランドでElizabeth Forresterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1582年，スコットランドでの職業はjudge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland と記録されている。彼は約1595年にスコットランドミドロスアンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire(이)가 대략 1515년 스컷랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Wardlaw(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1557년 5월 11일 스컷랜드에서 Elizabeth Forrester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1582년, 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland 이었다. 그는 대략 1595년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1515–about 1595: tany ho any amin'ny 1515–tany ho any amin'ny 1595

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, seu pai, Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Helen Wardlaw, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Forrester em 11 de maio de 1557, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1582, sua profissão aparece como judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  em Scotland. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1595, em Midlothian, Scotland, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire родился около 1515 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Wardlaw, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Forrester 11 мая 1557 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1582 году он работал по профессии judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  в местности Шотландия. Он умер около 1595 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David MacGill of Kirkcudbrightshire nació aproximadamente 1515, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, su papá, Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Helen Wardlaw, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Forrester el 11 de mayo de 1557, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1582, su ocupación registrada era judge and senator of the college of justice and lord advocate of scotland  en Scotland. Murió aproximadamente 1595, en Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 82 años.
